name: Gate Guardians Combined
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>体</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゲート・ガーディアン
desc:
"Sanga of the Thunder" + "Kazejin" + "Suijin"
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards from your hand, field, and/or GY. When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a card(s) you control (Quick Effect): You can negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Gate Guardians Combined" thrice per turn. If this face-up Special Summoned card in its owner's control leaves the field because of an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 Level 11 or lower "Gate Guardian" monster from your Deck or Extra Deck, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
Activates if it leaves the field
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires only specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
